creator: nvass@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 178008
new port virtualbox-ose-kmod with VIMAGE option set as default

VIMAGE-enabled kernels need a patched VirtualBox kernel module. Building VirtualBox can take several hours. It'd be great if there was a pre-built VBox-kmod package for VIMAGE-enabled kernels.

This port is just setting VIMAGE option so VIMAGE users can install VBox using "pkg install" and save time from building VBox on their own systems.

Thanks,
Nikos
